title: Knysna Rotary to hold 25th Charity Golf Tournament
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Rotary Club Knysna will...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Rotary Club Knysna will hold its 25th annual Charity Golf Tournament from 22 to 26 May at six different golf courses.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Rotary Club Knysna will hold its 25th annual Charity Golf Tournament from 22 to 26 May at six different golf courses."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Proceeds from the fundraiser are used to fund the Rotary Club's community-support programmes in the greater Knysna area.","html":"Proceeds from the fundraiser are used to fund the Rotary Club's community-support programmes in the greater Knysna area."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"We attract golfers from around the country and they play at premium courses between Mossel Bay and Plettenberg Bay,\" the club says."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The tournament kicks off on the Thursday at the Pinnacle Point Estate Golf Course in Mossel Bay and at the Kingswood Golf Course in George.","html":"The tournament kicks off on the Thursday at the Pinnacle Point Estate Golf Course in Mossel Bay and at the Kingswood Golf Course in George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On the Friday, the action moves to Knysna, taking place at the Simola Golf and Country Estate and the Pezula Championship Golf Course.","html":"On the Friday, the action moves to Knysna, taking place at the Simola Golf and Country Estate and the Pezula Championship Golf Course."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On the Saturday, golfers will tee off at the Knysna Golf Club and the Goose Valley Golf Club in Plettenberg Bay, and on the Sunday at the Simola and Pezula courses.","html":"On the Saturday, golfers will tee off at the Knysna Golf Club and the Goose Valley Golf Club in Plettenberg Bay, and on the Sunday at the Simola and Pezula courses."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The final day of the tournament will be be held at the Pinnacle Point and Kingswood courses.","html":"The final day of the tournament will be be held at the Pinnacle Point and Kingswood courses."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Prizes","html":"Prizes"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Rotary Club makes all the arrangements with the courses.","html":"The Rotary Club makes all the arrangements with the courses."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"Our club also arranges accommodation for out-of-town golfers and their partners at the Simola Hotel,\" they say. \"The format is two-person-team, better ball, with excellent prizes on Friday through to Sunday.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Golfers wishing to enter are asked to email Susan Fairweather at [email protected] to be sent an information sheet and booking form.","html":"Golfers wishing to enter are asked to email Susan Fairweather at [email protected] to be sent an information sheet and booking form."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Knysna Rotary to hold 25th Charity Golf Tournament
